workflow.name: MongoDB Replica Set HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate MongoDB Replica Set HA across existing member nodes with bash command steps.

data.label: Prepare MongoDB Replica Set HA node runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
log() { printf '[container-runtime] %s\n' "$*"; }
if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "docker is already installed"
  docker --version
  exit 0
fi
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with apt"
  apt-get update
  DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with dnf"
  dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with yum"
  yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
else
  echo "Unsupported package manager. Install Docker manually." >&2
  exit 1
fi
systemctl enable --now docker
docker version

data.label: Render MongoDB Replica Set HA node configuration
data.command:
set -euo pipefail

log() { printf '[mongodb_replica_set_ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
detect_current_ip() {
  for candidate in $(hostname -I 2>/dev/null); do
    case " 10.0.3.11 10.0.3.12 10.0.3.13 " in
      *" $candidate "*) printf '%s' "$candidate"; return 0 ;;
    esac
  done
  ip -o -4 addr show scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{split($4,a,"/"); print a[1]; exit}'
}
CURRENT_IP="${OCTASTACK_NODE_IP:-$(detect_current_ip)}"
NODE_NAME="$(hostname -s)"
NODE_ROLE="unknown"
NODE_INDEX=0
case "$CURRENT_IP" in
  10.0.3.11) NODE_NAME='mongodb-01'; NODE_ROLE='mongodb'; NODE_INDEX=1 ;;
  10.0.3.12) NODE_NAME='mongodb-02'; NODE_ROLE='mongodb'; NODE_INDEX=2 ;;
  10.0.3.13) NODE_NAME='mongodb-03'; NODE_ROLE='mongodb'; NODE_INDEX=3 ;;
esac
if [ "$NODE_ROLE" = "unknown" ]; then
  log "unable to match current host IP ($CURRENT_IP) to the generated topology"
  exit 1
fi
log "running on $NODE_NAME ($CURRENT_IP, role=$NODE_ROLE)"

install -d -m 0750 /opt/octastack/mongodb_replica_set_ha
install -d -m 0750 /var/lib/octastack/mongodb_replica_set_ha
cat >/opt/octastack/mongodb_replica_set_ha/.env <<EOF
MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME=root
MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD=change-me
OCTASTACK_NODE_NAME=$NODE_NAME
OCTASTACK_NODE_ROLE=$NODE_ROLE
OCTASTACK_NODE_INDEX=$NODE_INDEX
CURRENT_IP=$CURRENT_IP
FIRST_NODE_IP=10.0.3.11
CLUSTER_PEERS=10.0.3.11,10.0.3.12,10.0.3.13
SEED_IPS=10.0.3.11,10.0.3.12,10.0.3.13

EOF
chmod 0600 /opt/octastack/mongodb_replica_set_ha/.env

install -m 0400 /dev/stdin /opt/octastack/mongodb_replica_set_ha/keyfile <<'KEY'
octastack-mongodb-replica-set-shared-key-change-me
KEY

cat >/opt/octastack/mongodb_replica_set_ha/compose.yml <<'COMPOSE'
services:
  mongodb:
    image: mongo:7
    container_name: octastack-mongodb
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    env_file:
      - .env
    command: >
      mongod --replSet rs0 --bind_ip_all --keyFile /etc/mongo-keyfile
    volumes:
      - data:/data/db
      - /opt/octastack/mongodb_replica_set_ha/keyfile:/etc/mongo-keyfile:ro
volumes:
  data: {}
COMPOSE
log "configuration rendered"

data.label: Deploy MongoDB Replica Set HA node
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
log() { printf '[mongodb_replica_set_ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/mongodb_replica_set_ha/compose.yml pull
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/mongodb_replica_set_ha/compose.yml up -d
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/mongodb_replica_set_ha/compose.yml ps
      log "node deployment complete"

data.label: Initialize MongoDB Replica Set HA node
data.command:
set -euo pipefail

log() { printf '[mongodb-replica-set-ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
detect_current_ip() {
  for candidate in $(hostname -I 2>/dev/null); do
    case " 10.0.3.11 10.0.3.12 10.0.3.13 " in
      *" $candidate "*) printf '%s' "$candidate"; return 0 ;;
    esac
  done
  ip -o -4 addr show scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{split($4,a,"/"); print a[1]; exit}'
}
CURRENT_IP="${OCTASTACK_NODE_IP:-$(detect_current_ip)}"
NODE_NAME="$(hostname -s)"
NODE_ROLE="unknown"
NODE_INDEX=0
case "$CURRENT_IP" in
  10.0.3.11) NODE_NAME='mongodb-01'; NODE_ROLE='mongodb'; NODE_INDEX=1 ;;
  10.0.3.12) NODE_NAME='mongodb-02'; NODE_ROLE='mongodb'; NODE_INDEX=2 ;;
  10.0.3.13) NODE_NAME='mongodb-03'; NODE_ROLE='mongodb'; NODE_INDEX=3 ;;
esac
if [ "$NODE_ROLE" = "unknown" ]; then
  log "unable to match current host IP ($CURRENT_IP) to the generated topology"
  exit 1
fi
log "running on $NODE_NAME ($CURRENT_IP, role=$NODE_ROLE)"

container_ready=0
for attempt in $(seq 1 60); do
  if docker exec octastack-mongodb sh -lc "mongosh --quiet --eval 'db.adminCommand({ ping: 1 })'" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    container_ready=1
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
if [ "$container_ready" = "1" ]; then
  log "container octastack-mongodb is ready"
else
docker logs octastack-mongodb --tail=120 || true
echo "container octastack-mongodb did not become ready" >&2
exit 1
fi

if [ "$NODE_INDEX" != "1" ]; then
  log "replica set initiation is handled by the first member"
  exit 0
fi
docker exec octastack-mongodb mongosh -u root -p change-me --authenticationDatabase admin <<'JS'
rs.initiate({
  _id: "rs0",
  members: [
    { _id: 0, host: "10.0.3.11:27017" },
    { _id: 1, host: "10.0.3.12:27017" },
    { _id: 2, host: "10.0.3.13:27017" }
  ]
});
JS

data.label: Document MongoDB Replica Set HA topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/mongodb_replica_set_ha-topology.md <<'EOF'
# MongoDB Replica Set HA

Members:
- mongodb-01: 10.0.3.11 (mongodb)
- mongodb-02: 10.0.3.12 (mongodb)
- mongodb-03: 10.0.3.13 (mongodb)

Three MongoDB members form a replica set with a shared keyfile, deterministic member list, and first-member initiation.
EOF
cat /tmp/mongodb_replica_set_ha-topology.md

data.label: Validate MongoDB Replica Set HA node
data.command: docker exec octastack-mongodb mongosh -u root -p change-me --authenticationDatabase admin --quiet --eval 'rs.status().members.map(m => `${m.name} ${m.stateStr}`).join("\n")'

data.label: MongoDB Replica Set HA health check
data.command: docker exec octastack-mongodb mongosh -u root -p change-me --authenticationDatabase admin --quiet --eval 'db.adminCommand({ ping: 1 })'
